# fcs_iaas_vdc (Resource)

An IaaS-vDC service container for standalone Harvester VMs. The platform owns NAT gateway and KubeOVN state; Terraform manages the stable vDC intent.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) ID of the fcs_environment hosting this IaaS-vDC. Changing it forces a new vDC.
- `name` (String) IaaS-vDC name; idempotency key per environment. Changing it forces a new vDC.

### Optional

- `labels` (Map of String) Free-form labels. Changing them forces a new vDC.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `gateway_name` (String) KubeOVN VpcNatGateway name owned by this vDC.
- `gateway_scope` (String) Gateway scope, always iaas_vdc for this resource.
- `gateway_vpc_name` (String) KubeOVN VPC name owned by this vDC service gateway.
- `iaas_vdc_seq` (Number) Short platform sequence used for service-scoped NAT gateway names.
- `id` (String) Server-assigned IaaS-vDC ID (UUID).
- `scope_key` (String) NAT gateway scope key for this vDC.
- `status` (String) Lifecycle status: planned | provisioning | active | error | destroying | destroyed.
